title: cert_verify_and_cache_leaf_pubkey: cached_key_flags undocumented
description: cert.rs: cert_verify_and_cache_leaf_pubkey has a cached_key_flags: u16 parameter with no documentation. Unlike the access/flags parameters on nvm_add (which point to WH_NVM_ACCESS_* / WH_NVM_FLAGS_* in wolfhsm/wh_nvm.h), this parameter is completely silent. A contributor cannot tell what values are valid, whether 0 is safe, or what the flags control. This is a security-adjacent API — a wrong flags value could affect key access control. Fix: add a doc comment pointing to the relevant wolfHSM C header constants (e.g., WH_KEYTYPE_* or WH_NVM_FLAGS_*) and note that 0 gives default behavior.
